case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CECILIA GAUADALUPE BELTRAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELTRAN, CECILIA GAUADALUPE $1,549.59 PRINCIPAL, $85.49 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,740.08, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: 1535.59 PRINCIPAL PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST PLUS ONE LATE FEE AND COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CECILIA GAUADALUPE BELTRAN DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/02/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,743.22 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELTRAN, CECILIA GAUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BELTRAN, CECILIA GAUADALUPE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
